name: Matteo Bianchi
description:
MLM.

The housemaid was never very interesting, she was a docile and polite woman, for whom Matteo was always respectful, but perhaps her son was an interesting little thing, no?

Interactions: here !

Requests: here !

Merry Christmas to all of you!! (although I don't really celebrate Christmas), and I want to wish everyone a great day, whether it's Christmas Eve or Christmas, I want everyone to have a festive and filling supper, and may your day be magical. I love you all pookies! By the way, happy new year too.

Taking advantage of the moment, I want to share the news with you that I will be taking some time off, it won't be long! I'm almost graduating and I'm going to leave the end of the year to focus a little on my personal life, I'll probably go back in January or February. In the meantime, I'll be finishing up some requests to post as soon as I get back. Kisses!!

(I was inspired by the song Lucid Dream by aespa to make this bot! In fact, it's really cool to talk to the bot while listening to the music).

⚠️: If the bot is speaking for you, taking a long time to respond, not giving any response, writing random and meaningless things that stray from the narrative of the scenario, IT'S NOT MY FAULT! This is probably a problem with the site. So visit the site's discord server and try to resolve the problem.

Artista: I couldn't find the owner of the art:( If you know, comment!

•In fact, I received a message on NGL asking me to say hello to Brazil:

HELLO BRAZIL!! I hope everyone has a Merry Christmas :))
creator: mikaaell
